prestazioni: Replace the stock Ford-sourced 3.8L V8 (code: *PRAGA V8-3.8L*) with a bespoke *Cosworth CNC-ported cylinder head* featuring 42mm titanium intake valves, 36mm sodium-filled exhaust valves, and a *Mahle Motorsport forged piston set* (9.5:1 CR) with *DLC-coated wrist pins* for 9000 RPM stability, paired with a *Tomei 272° duration billet camshaft* and *Ferrea Competition valve springs* to unlock 750+ HP on E85 with a *Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbo* (1.15 A/R, 106mm compressor wheel) and *Tial MV-R 60mm wastegate*

Install a *Praga-specific Motec M190 ECU* with *Plex Knock Monitor* integration, *AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensors*, and a *Radium Engineering dual-catch can system* (AN-10 lines) to manage the *Dry Sump System* (ATI Performance Products 8-stage pump) and *C&R Racing triple-pass intercooler* (5.5" core, 1200 CFM airflow) with *Aeroquip Startlite -8AN hoses* for sustained 2.5-bar boost

Upgrade the transaxle with a *Praga sequential 6-speed dog-ring gearbox* (AP Racing 240mm triple-plate carbon clutch) and *Quaife ATB differential* (45% lock), paired with a *Penske 8760 3-way adjustable coilover kit* (2000 lb/in springs, remote reservoirs) and *Brembo GT-R calipers* (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with *PFC carbon-ceramic rotors* (390mm front, 360mm rear) and *Ferodo DS3000 pads* for 1.5g braking
estetica: Fit a *Praga x Vellum Carbon full monocoque chassis reinforcement* (pre-preg autoclave carbon, 1.2mm thickness) with *Aeromotions active rear wing* (3-element, 15° attack angle, 120kg downforce at 250 km/h) and *Rocket Bunny Type-5 front splitter* (adjustable dive planes, 80kg front downforce) in *3M Matte Graphite* with *Airlift Performance air struts* for static ride height adjustment

Replace all exterior lighting with *Lux HID Projectors* (5500K, Morimoto ballasts) and *Osram Laserline taillights* (sequential turn signals, 30ms response time), paired with *Vorsteiner V-FF 101 forged wheels* (19x12" front, 20x13" rear, +38mm offset) wrapped in *Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R* (285/30 R19 front, 335/30 R20 rear) and *HRE FlowForm center-lock adapters*

Install a *Praga x Recaro Pole Position seat* (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point Schroth harness) with *Sabelt 806 racing belts*, *MOMO Prototipo steering wheel* (suede, 350mm diameter, quick-release), and *AiM MXL2 data logger* (GPS, lap timing, 10Hz sampling) integrated into a *Sparco Evo III racing suit* (Nomex, FIA 8856-2018 certified) with *Alpinestars Tech-1 KX v2 boots*
